summary.overall_judgment: The deterministic prefilter sample was mostly clean, but one dropped policy notice should have been surfaced for review rather than dropped outright.

artifact_reviews.title: Center For Scientific Review; Notice of Closed Meetings
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Meeting notice only. No directional capital-flow implication.

artifact_reviews.title: Request for Comments on the Renewal of a Previously Approved Information Collection: Requirements for Establishing U.S. Citizenship
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Information-collection renewal only. No demand-led buildout or directional capital deployment signal.

artifact_reviews.title: Agency Information Collection Activities; Proposed Renewal Collection and Request for Comment; Confidential Business Information Claims Under the Toxic Substances Control Act (TSCA)
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Paperwork-renewal notice without current or planned physical buildout implications.

artifact_reviews.title: Notice of Availability of the 2025 Record of Decision for the Final Environmental Impact Statement for the National Petroleum Reserve-Alaska, Integrated Activity Plan
artifact_reviews.review_notes: This is policy-enabling rather than demand-proving, but it concerns petroleum reserve planning and could plausibly precede resource-development capital deployment. The title-level prefilter should likely surface this for review instead of dropping it.

artifact_reviews.title: Privacy Act of 1974; Matching Program
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Eligibility-matching/privacy program notice only. No capital-flow signal.

artifact_reviews.title: Privacy Act of 1974; System of Records
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Records-system modification notice only. No directional capital-flow implication.

artifact_reviews.title: Proposed Information Collection Activity; Next Generation of Enhanced Employment Strategies Project
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Survey/data-collection extension only. No evidence of material capital deployment.

artifact_reviews.title: Agency Information Collection Activities; Submission to the Office of Management and Budget for Review and Approval; Comment Request; the Recognition Process for Accrediting Agencies, State Approval Agencies; Evaluation of Foreign Medical, and Foreign Veterinary Accrediting Agencies (e-Recognition)
artifact_reviews.review_notes: OMB review and accreditation-process paperwork only. No directional capital-flow signal.

artifact_reviews.title: Air Plan Approval; Connecticut; State Implementation Plan Revisions Required as a Result of a Definition Change Due to the Ozone Reclassification
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Compliance and emissions-plan rulemaking context, not direct evidence of rising-demand capital deployment.

artifact_reviews.title: Certain Lined Paper Products From India: Preliminary Results and Rescission, in Part, of Antidumping Duty Administrative Review; 2023-2024
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Trade-review result with no direct directional capital-flow implication for the current workflow.

artifact_reviews.title: Change in Bank Control Notices; Acquisitions of Shares of a Bank or Bank Holding Company
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Ownership/control notice for a financial institution, not a physical-system capital-flow signal relevant to structural-pressure discovery.

artifact_reviews.title: Crystalline Silicon Photovoltaic Cells, Whether or Not Assembled Into Modules From the Lao People's Democratic Republic: Preliminary Affirmative Countervailing Duty Determination, Preliminary Negative Critical Circumstances Determination, and Alignment of Final Determination With Final Antidumping Duty Determination
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Trade-remedy determination that could matter later as policy context, but the artifact alone does not indicate current or planned demand-led capital deployment.

artifact_reviews.title: Determination of Regulatory Review Period for Purposes of Patent Extension; AEROPACE
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Patent-extension determination only. No directional capital-flow implication for the current workflow.

artifact_reviews.title: Determination of Regulatory Review Period for Purposes of Patent Extension; ORLYNVAH
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Patent-extension determination only. No current or planned physical buildout signal.

artifact_reviews.title: Information Collection Requirement; Defense Federal Acquisition Regulation Supplement; Performance-Based Payments-Representation (OMB Control Number 0750-0001)
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Defense acquisition paperwork extension only. No actual procurement, construction, or capacity signal in the artifact.

artifact_reviews.title: Meeting of the Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Advisory-committee meeting notice only. No directional capital-flow implication.

artifact_reviews.title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Information Collection Renewal; Submission for OMB Review; OCC Supplier Registration Form
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Supplier-registration paperwork renewal only. No procurement or buildout event is being signaled.

artifact_reviews.title: Agency Information Collection Activities; Northeast Region Hunter Participation Surveys
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Survey revision only. No capital-flow or physical buildout implication.

artifact_reviews.title: Certain Beverage Brewing Products and Components Thereof; Notice of Institution of Investigation
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Patent/import investigation notice. This is litigation/trade enforcement context, not a directional capital-flow signal for rising-demand structural pressure.

artifact_reviews.title: Constellation Energy Generation, LLC; Dresden Nuclear Power Station, Unit 1; Exemption
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Decommissioning-timeline exemption for an existing plant. Not evidence of new demand-led capital deployment.

artifact_reviews.title: Issuance of Priority Review Voucher; Rare Pediatric Disease Product; ZYCUBO (Copper Histidinate)
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Potentially relevant to a constrained-access or drug-exclusivity workflow later, but out of scope for the current rising-demand capital-flow workflow.

artifact_reviews.title: Meeting of the Great Lakes St. Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation (GLS) Advisory Board
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Board meeting notice only. No directional capital-flow implication.

artifact_reviews.title: New Postal Products
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Administrative notice about a negotiated service agreement. No capital-flow or physical-system buildout signal.

artifact_reviews.title: Notice of Receipt of Complaint; Solicitation of Comments Relating to the Public Interest
artifact_reviews.review_notes: ITC complaint/public-interest notice only. No directional capital-flow implication.

artifact_reviews.title: Withdrawal of 2023 Standard for Determining Joint Employer Status
artifact_reviews.review_notes: Labor-rule withdrawal may matter as general policy context, but the artifact itself is not a direct signal of demand-led capital deployment.
